claimText: UNSW's first key principle for AI in assessment requires staff to be honest and transparent about the use of any AI tool where it would reasonably be expected that use of the tool would be disclosed.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Be honest and transparent about the use of any AI tool where it would reasonably be expected that use of the tool would be disclosed.

citation.citationTitle: Guidance on AI in assessment | UNSW Staff Teaching Gateway
